message:
feat(fastapi-core): add middleware infrastructure, typed extractors, and response enhancements

Implement comprehensive middleware support with FromRequestParts pattern for
typed extraction of request components. This enables clean, type-safe handlers
where dependencies are automatically extracted from requests.

Key additions:

Middleware infrastructure (middleware.rs):
- Middleware trait with async apply() method for request/response transformation
- MiddlewareStack for composing multiple middleware layers in order
- RequestContext for middleware state propagation
- Built-in middleware: RequestId, RequestTiming, Cors, Compression, Security headers
- Support for early returns (redirects, auth failures) via middleware short-circuit

Typed extractors (extract.rs):
- FromRequestParts trait following axum's proven extraction pattern
- Path<T>: Extract typed path parameters with automatic deserialization
- Query<T>: Extract and deserialize query string parameters
- Header<T>: Extract typed header values with FromStr parsing
- Json<T>: Extract JSON body with serde deserialization
- Form<T>: Extract form data from application/x-www-form-urlencoded
- State<T>: Access shared application state
- Extension<T>: Access request extensions
- Rejection types with proper HTTP status codes for each extractor

Response improvements (response.rs):
- Response builder with common content types
- Status code helpers for common responses

Also updates Cargo.toml with required dependencies for async handling
and serialization support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Detailed: #[derive(HealthCheck)] with named checks, critical flag, returns status (healthy/degraded/unhealthy) with per-check latency. Kubernetes probes: app.liveness_probe(/healthz) and app.readiness_probe(/ready).  {"id":"fastapi_rust-zf4","title":"DI system test suite","description":"Comprehensive test suite for dependency injection:

TEST CATEGORIES:

1. BASIC RESOLUTION
- Simple dependency resolution
- Multiple dependencies in handler
- Async dependency functions

2. CACHING
- Same dependency returns cached instance
- use_cache=false returns fresh
- Scope isolation (request vs function)

3. NESTED DEPENDENCIES
- A depends on B
- A depends on B, B depends on C
- Diamond: A depends on B and C, both depend on D

4. CLEANUP (YIELD PATTERN)
- Cleanup runs on success
- Cleanup runs on error
- Cleanup runs on panic
- LIFO cleanup order

5. OVERRIDES
- Override replaces dependency
- Override affects nested deps
- Clear overrides works

6. SAFETY
- Circular dependency detection
- Scope constraint validation
- Clear error messages

7. INTEGRATION
- Full request with complex deps
- TestClient with overrides
- Real resource cleanup (files, connections)

COVERAGE TARGET: 95%+ for DI code","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T15:15:31.036635303Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-21T10:34:38.650976297Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T10:34:38.650927014Z","close_reason":"Comprehensive DI test suite implemented: 10 unit tests in dependency.rs covering overrides, caching, scopes, async resolution, error propagation; 4 integration tests in testing.rs with complex nested dependencies and TestClient. Fixed middleware.rs test lifetime issues.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["di","phase-4","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-zf4","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-lrz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:34Z","created_by":"import"}]}

 {"id":"fastapi_rust-zom","title":"HTTPException struct and error responses","description":"Implement HTTPException equivalent for user-thrown errors:

STRUCTURE:
- status_code: u16 (required)
- detail: serde_json::Value (optional - string, object, or array)
- headers: Option<HeaderMap> (optional - extra response headers)

BEHAVIOR:
- Can be returned from any handler or extractor
- Automatically converted to HTTP response
- Preserves status code and headers
- JSON body: {"detail": <detail>}

COMMON CONSTRUCTORS:
- HttpError::not_found(detail)
- HttpError::bad_request(detail)
- HttpError::unauthorized() (with WWW-Authenticate)
- HttpError::forbidden(detail)
- HttpError::internal_server_error()

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- HttpError can be returned from handler
- Status code, headers, body all work
- Ergonomic constructors for common cases
- IntoResponse implementation

TEST REQUIREMENTS:
- Unit: Each status code constructor
- Unit: Custom headers
- Unit: Various detail types (string, object)
- Integration: Error response in handler
- Coverage: All common HTTP error codes","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T15:09:48.892226143Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T16:26:00.927800425Z","closed_at":"2026-01-17T16:26:00.927800425Z","close_reason":"HTTPException implemented in crates/fastapi-core/src/error.rs: HttpError struct with status, detail, headers; IntoResponse impl; convenience constructors (bad_request, unauthorized, forbidden, not_found, internal)","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["critical","errors","http","phase-1"]}
 {"id":"fastapi_rust-zva","title":"OAuth2AuthorizationCodeBearer extractor","description":"OAuth2 Authorization Code flow extractor. Required: authorizationUrl (authorization endpoint), tokenUrl (token endpoint). Optional: refreshUrl, scopes dict, scheme_name, description, auto_error. Extracts Bearer token from Authorization header. OpenAPI security scheme type: oauth2 with authorizationCode flow. Test: verify token extraction, 401 on missing/invalid, OpenAPI schema correct.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T15:43:36.899753829Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T15:43:36.899753829Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["authcode","oauth2","phase-6","security"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-zva","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-nij","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:34Z","created_by":"import"}]}

@@ -18,10 +18,15 @@ futures-executor = "0.3"
 # Optional regex support for testing assertions
 regex = { version = "1", optional = true }
 
+# Optional compression support (gzip)
+flate2 = { version = "1.1", optional = true }
+
 [features]
 default = []
 # Enable regex support in testing assertions
 regex = ["dep:regex"]
+# Enable response compression middleware
+compression = ["dep:flate2"]
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 fastapi-macros = { path = "../fastapi-macros" }
